entry.title: UI5/Fiori Elements V4 Upgrade: Navigating the AddressViaNavigationPath Breaking Change
entry.content:
# Introduction

Recently, I upgraded a UI5 and Fiori Elements V4 application from version 1.132.1 to 1.136.13. While the upgrade process was relatively smooth, I encountered an interesting breaking change related to entity associations and PATCH requests that I'd like to share with the community.

## The Issue

During testing, I discovered that PATCH requests for nested entity associations were suddenly failing after the upgrade. The root cause? A behavioral change in how the framework constructs update paths for related entities.

### What Changed

In versions prior to 1.135, when updating entities with one-to-many associations, the framework used **short paths** in PATCH requests. However, starting with version 1.135 and continuing through 1.136.13, the framework began using **long paths** when the following annotation was present at the entity container level:

```xml
<Annotation Term="Common.AddressViaNavigationPath" Bool="true"/>
```

**Example of the difference:**
- **Short path (old behavior):** `/EntityA(key1)/NavPropertyB/EntityB(key2)`
- **Long path (new behavior):** `/EntityA(key1)/to_NavPropertyB(key2)`

This change broke compatibility with existing backend services that expected the short path format.

## The Solution

The fix is straightforward and should be applied at the **CDS annotation level**. You need to explicitly set the `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath` annotation to `false` on your entities:

```cds
@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false
entity MyEntity {
// entity definition
}
```

### Implementation Steps

1. **Locate affected entities** - Identify entities with one-to-many associations that are being updated
2. **Add the annotation** - Apply `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false` to the entity definition
3. **Test PATCH requests** - Verify that update requests now use short paths
4. **Redeploy** - Deploy your changes and test end-to-end

## Why This Matters

This breaking change highlights an important principle when upgrading frameworks: **always test data modifications thoroughly**. While UI rendering changes are often immediately visible, changes to request payload structures can silently break integrations.

## Conclusion

If you're upgrading to Fiori Elements V4 1.135 or later and experience issues with entity updates, check your entity annotations. A simple `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false` annotation can restore the previous behavior and ensure backward compatibility with your backend services.

Have you encountered similar breaking changes during upgrades? Share your experiences in the comments below!

entry.title: API to S4 Tables to Azure
entry.content: Need guidance on how to configure a connection from Azure Cloud to SAP S4 tables for extraction of transactional data from ACDOCA

entry.title: Wrong behavior of sap.ui.core.theming.Parameters for sap.gantt.simple.GanttChartContainer
entry.content:
Hi,

After upgrading our system to S4/2023 and the latest available SAPUI5 ABAP Patch 1.120.39, i get this error from rendering the GanttChart we use in one of our views: [FUTURE FATAL] One or more parameters could not be found. - sap.ui.core.theming.Parameters. I debuged this and realized, that the hex color we use for the property "fill" in the sap.gantt.simple.BaseRectangle, will pass directly to the parameter sName from sap/ui/core/theming/Parameters.js and at the moment the method with the propertyName: sName is returned, the error appeare in the console. It seems, the difference between a real parameter name and a hex color can't be distinguished and therefore, i get too many errors, that i sent above, in the console.

Could you please help me to solve this?

 

Best regards,

Setareh Ganjimanesh

entry.title: Earlywatch FDQ Financial Data Integrity
entry.content:
Hi,

In the EarlyWatch, in the chapter Financial Data Quality, we have paragraph :

15.1.1 Mismatch of Function Setting between Master Data and Items

....

Type 2: Mismatch of function setting between master data (marked as not open item managed) data and items (marked as open item managed).

The following list shows G/L accounts that have a mismatch between master data and item settings:

Error Type

Company Code

G/L Account

Fiscal Year

Analysis Date

Error Description

3

1005

0031000004

1999

30.06.2024

 

3

1001

0033000000

1999

30.06.2024

 

3

1004

0030000002

1999

30.06.2024

 

3

1005

0038000000

1999

30.06.2024

 

We have already applyed the SAP Note 175960. anr ran programm ZF_SWITCH_OFF_XOPVW , but those result still appear with the analysis date at 30.06.2024.

Which program do we need to run to restart the analysis that generates this report?

Thanks

entry.title: sap.ui.mdc.ValueHelp - how to display different Operators for "Define Conditions" panel?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am currently implementing a value help via sap.ui.mdc.ValueHelp.

I used the example of the DemoKit as reference and I want to display the "Define Conditions" panel.

My problem now is that only the operator "EQ" is available for the conditions and nothing I tried seems to work (I tried to use the

sap.ui.mdc.field.ConditionsType, tried to set property "operators" for the defined FilterField).
 
You can reproduce the scenario in the Demo Kit expamle by adding <mdcvc:Conditions></mdcvc:Conditions> to the mdcvh:Dialog content aggregation:

https://ui5.sap.com/1.136/#/entity/sap.ui.mdc.ValueHelp/sample/sap.ui.mdc.demokit.sample.FieldValueHelpJson/code 

How can I provide more operators like Contains, StartsWith etc.?

I appreciate any help!

 

Thanks in advance

Julia

entry.title: Error encountered in Stylesheet after implementing latest patch SAPUI5
entry.content:
After implementing the latest patch update of SAPUI5 they encountered stylesheet 404 error aborted. Below error was encountered by other user.

 

Error:

includeStylesheet-dbg.js:77  GET https://gs.tst.gea.com/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/processroutes1/~0538751110A5A16D011429B8A432672F~5/themes/sap_horizon/library.css?version=${version}&sap-ui-dist-version=1.120.43 net::ERR_ABORTED 404 (Not Found)

entry.title: Need to Archive 6 6 years o Performance Forms
entry.content: My Company will need to archive about 21 team members' forms (last 6 years) is it possible to do multiple years at the same time for each team member instead of doing it one year at a time for all 21 team members?

entry.title: Add CA10 Standard Text to Operation Long Text in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Public Cloud, is there a supported way to insert or reuse CA10 standard texts in the operation long text of maintenance task lists?

In ECC / SAP GUI there is an option to insert standard text (CA10) directly into the long text. In the Fiori app Change General Maintenance Task List, this option does not seem to be available.

Is there:

  • a standard function or workaround to insert CA10 texts into operation long texts, or
  • a recommended best practice for reusing standard texts in task list operations in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any clarification would be appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: Custom controller for a Fiori elements V4 app
entry.content:
Hello 


I have created a custom SAP Fiori elements List Report app in BTP BAS using a backend OData V4 service, which is working fine.

I now need to add a new action to the app. When the user clicks this button, a popup should open containing a table with multiple rows selected from the initial screen. Since this could not be achieved using RAP functionality alone, I am trying to implement it using a custom controller extension.

I have enhanced the MANIFEST.json file and created a new action button and controller extension.

However, when I click the new button, the 'onOpenPopup'  method is not being triggered.  Any inputs? IS my approach correct?.

I see the onInit, onBeforeRendering and onAfterRendering  triggering during initial load of the app.

Thank you !

 new  button and controller extension in manifest.json

 


Mycontroller:

entry.title: Fiori List Report Issue with OData V4 VS V2
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created a OData V4 Fiori List Report Template.

Here are we are facing couple of Issue
Backend CDS View is Parameterized CDS View.

So the CDS Parameters are going to be Mandatory for the Selection or execute. Here when we are trying to add the new filter by using the Adopt filter options those filters are also showing in UI as Mandatory. ( Only Visual as * )
Table Settings, When we are selecting the columns to display in V2 App we can see the options as Show Selected / select all columns. Here we are seeing it has Deselect all.

entry.title: BK error using RSP
entry.content:
Dear community, I need your help. I've already asked my partner for help, but I'd like to hear your opinions on this error I'm getting when managing my scheduled backups using RSP. If I try to perform the backup using HANA Studio with an export command, I also receive the same error message. I tried reducing the number of threads, but the error persists, I am using SAP Business one 10 / hana. I've attached an image of the error message.

Thank you all very much.

entry.title: SAP ISU Schedule MRO creation issue
entry.content: Hi everyone, I am unable to create schedules records against the MRU for July to December there is no schedule records found, I tried to create but it is not created and no error occurred, when I am using t-code E43A and executes it with MRU and dates input then blank screen comes (generally in normal cases dates came when it generated). Can anyone help on this? SAP Utility Customer E-Services SAP Utilities Customer Engagement Thanks

entry.title: 3747694 - ABAP SAPUI5 1.120.45 : /UI5/MIME_CLEANUP failed
entry.content: We implemented SAPUI5-Version 1.120.45 with note #3747694. Now we would like to clean up the old mime repository with report "/UI5/MIME_CLEANUP". But the job failed due to a lock problem. We already checked SE03. But we can't find a solution. How we can fix the problem? Please check attached document.

entry.title: Logon suffix disappears.
entry.content:
Good Day,

Could you please assist? Launching of a custom SAPUI5 website with the language and client suffix(?sap-language=EN&sapclient=100).

The language & client suffix does appear upon initial login, but disappears once the website is reloaded(login is cached).

The system is currently on S/4HANA 2023

I have gone through the config, the profile parameters are set, sicf configurations and the language is installed.

Manually appending the suffix to the website is not a option.

entry.title: Logon Suffix Dissappears
entry.content:
Good Day,

Could you please assist? Launching of a custom SAPUI5 website with the language and client suffix(?sap-language=EN&sapclient=100).

The language & client suffix does appear upon initial login, but disappears once the website is reloaded(login is cached).

The system is currently on S/4HANA 2023

I have gone through the config, the profile parameters are set, sicf configurations and the language is installed.

Manually appending the suffix to the website is not a option.

entry.title: In fiori Navigation panel, selected filters are truncated and not visible
entry.content:
After selecting some data in the filters of the Navigation panel (standard fiori apps), we cannot see the values these are truncated 

 

The filter criteria set are all not directly visible completely: every entry seems truncated to show the "x" within the field. 
It is thus very annoying and especially time consuming (for all Fiori users) to verify if filters have been set correctly.
It would be very much appreciated if there is a possibility to enlarge these icons/tokens somehow

entry.title: SAP EHS WWI: change generated PDF filename from MATNR to customer code
entry.content:
We are working on an SAP EHS / WWI project related to Compliance and SDS generation.

We generate reports from transaction CG54 and use the option:

"Send to SAP spooler only for now"

The generated PDF finally appears in SAP Office with a filename following this standard pattern:

Material_<REPORT_CATEGORY>.PDF

Example:
123456_MSDS_EN.PDF

Our requirement is to replace the MATNR with a customer code / customer material number.

So far we have investigated the following:

  • WWI templates and symbols
  • Generation Variants (SRGV)
  • Report Shipping / MSDS_DIST
  • DDOC logs in SLG1
  • Programs RC1WWIDP and RC1WWIWP
  • Function module C1DA_REP_WORK_PROCESS
  • FM CVEA_RDOS_CREATE_BY_EHS

We also identified that the generated document is stored in DMS using:

C14S_DOCUMENT_ORIGINAL_PUT

and that the WWI server returns the filename in variable:

V_TRG_DOC1_NAME

through FM:

WWI_GENERATE_AND_IMPORT2

However, we are still unsure whether:

  1. The attachment filename is generated directly by the WWI server
  2. The filename is reconstructed later during DDOC / MSDS_DIST / SAPoffice processing
  3. There is any standard enhancement/BAdI/customizing specifically intended to control the attachment filename

Questions:

  • Has anyone changed the standard WWI/EHS attachment filename successfully?
  • Is there any standard BAdI, User Exit or Enhancement Spot for this?
  • Does SAP standard always generate filenames based on MATNR + Report Category + Language?
  • Is the SAPoffice attachment name taken from DMS original filename or rebuilt later during report shipping?

We are debugging standard programs/functions but we would like to avoid modifying SAP standard if a proper enhancement spot already exists.

Any hints about the correct enhancement point would be greatly appreciated.

Regards.

AG

entry.title: Adaptation Project development with flp sandbox 404 error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

To enhance the standard Fiori App, we created the adaption project with VSCode.

Currently, we are facing flp sandbox 404 error during adaptation project development(Open Adaptation Editor & Preview Application).  Are any solutions for this error?

Background:

The back-end ABAP version is OP2023SP1.

Due to our internal internet is not able to reach 'https://ui5.sap.com',  we replaced it with 'http://< host name>:<service port>/sap/public/bc/ui5_ui5/' in ui5.yaml file to make sure the app could load those UI5 librarys such as sap-ui-core.js. By this way, we could preview the app with 'noflp' option but we face sanbox 404 error with the 'flp' option.

Unfortunately, it seems the adaptation project development(Both 'Open Adaptation Editor' and 'Preview Application') are using the 'flp' option only so that we could not avoid this error.

Thanks

Jon

entry.title: How we can pass parameters from UI5 application to HTML for gui app in fiori lauchpad?
entry.content:
Here is my custom application where sales order is generated with billing document number and parcel number. Those Billing document and parcel number i have to display in HTML for GUI app (Receipt Voucher) custom ABAP report in Fiori Launchpad. 

  Above billing document number and parcel number i have to pass to HTML for GUI app (Receipt Voucher)

Here is the js function i have written 

onReceiptBoucher: function() {
var sBillingDoc = 78454656565;
var sParcelNo = 5454626526;
 
if (!sBillingDoc || !sParcelNo) {
sap.m.MessageBox.error("Please generate billing document first.");
return;
}
 
var xmservice = sap.ushell && sap.ushell.Container &&
sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation");
 
if (xmservice) {
var hash = xmservice.hrefForExternal({
target: {
semanticObject: "ZRV",
action: "display"
},
// Parameters perfectly match your configuration mapping
params: {
"BillingDoc": [String(sBillingDoc)],
"ParcelNum": [String(sParcelNo)],
"DYNP_OKCODE": ["=ONLI"] // Bypasses selection screen by clicking Execute
}
});
 
var url = window.location.href.split('#')[0] + hash;
sap.m.URLHelper.redirect(url, true);
} else {
sap.m.MessageToast.show("Fiori Launchpad services are unavailable.");
}
}

entry.title: Fiori Elements ALP (OData V2): Basic Search field shown despite @Search.searchable: false in CDS
entry.content:
Problem:

In an Analytical List Page (ALP) application based on a directly exposed CDS view, the Basic Search field is displayed in the SmartFilterBar, even though search is explicitly disabled by using the CDS Annotation: @search.searchable: false.

Analytical List Page (OData V2, UI5 1.71, SAP_BASIS 750)

Expectation: Basic Search should be hidden.
Actual behavior: Basic Search is still displayed.

Important:

  • No @search.* annotations on field level
  • Only @search.searchable: false on view level

Findings
The behavior appears to contradict the expected semantics of the annotation.
In this setup (SAP_BASIS 750 + UI5 1.71 + OData V2), the system behaves as follows:

The mere presence of the annotation @search.searchable (regardless of its value) seems to activate search capabilities in the OData service and UI.

As a result:

The SmartFilterBar interprets the service as search-enabled
The Basic Search field is displayed, even when set to false

Workaround
Remove (or comment out) the annotation completely
@search.searchable: false

Side Effect

After removing the annotation, the CDS view produces a syntax/activation warning or error similar to:
"@Search annotations require 'searchable' for the view"

However:

If the CDS is still activated (ignoring the warning)
The resulting behavior is that the Basic Search field is no longer displayed
